seoTitle: Cardstone vs Carina — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cardstone and Carina. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cardstone and Carina.
heading: Cardstone vs Carina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cardstone, Queensland and Carina, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cardstone has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Carina (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cardstone or Carina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cardstone has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Carina scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cardstone scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Carina scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cardstone or Carina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cardstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
